response.original_title: Aasro: The Story of Shram Dham
response.overview: Aasro: The Story of Shram Dham is an award-winning Indian short documentary directed by Sainath S. Uskaikar. It chronicles the inspiring real-life housing initiative of tribal leader and former Goa Legislative Assembly Speaker, Ramesh Tawadkar, who spearheaded a mission to build secure homes for the underprivileged and homeless in Canacona, Goa.
response.title: Aasro: The Story of Shram Dham
